content: I will write a script to search the transcript log for any tool calls that wrote or modified `src/App.tsx` to find the exact code contents that were written before the login modifications.
thinking:
**Investigating File Truncation**

I'm focusing now on why only 94 lines were parsed. I've realized the problem isn't inherent to the file itself, but maybe how it was accessed. `app_tsx_step_1460.txt` had "truncated 10139 bytes," according to my log. It seems that when reading the file using `view_file` in step 1460, the file was truncated, meaning only a portion of it was accessed.

args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"other","Summary":"Created find_write_calls.cjs to search conversation logs for write_to_file or replace_file_content calls on App.tsx."}
args.Description: "Created find_write_calls.cjs to extract write_to_file content for App.tsx."
